results.alt:
Jewelry With Intention Velmora was born from a simple belief: every woman deserves jewelry that feels
              as special as she is — without the luxury markup. We design demi-fine pieces
              in 18K gold plating that are made to last, meant to layer, and crafted with the
              kind of attention to detail usually reserved for fine jewelry houses. artisan gold jewelry making
